full_text:
Sun Lü 孫慮
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Lü (孫慮). Cousin of Sun Jun and Sun Chen, but committed suicide for failed rebellion. Sun Lü was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Sun Lü lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
